synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-2790 Oracle Linux 9 opencryptoki bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2790
description:
[3.25.0-4.1]
- Fix unwrapping of attribute bound EC keys
- Fix private secure key blob import
  Resolves: RHEL-131644
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2790

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-2790.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
opencryptoki-3.25.0-4.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
opencryptoki-ccatok-3.25.0-4.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
opencryptoki-devel-3.25.0-4.el9_7.1.i686.rpm
opencryptoki-devel-3.25.0-4.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
opencryptoki-icsftok-3.25.0-4.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
opencryptoki-libs-3.25.0-4.el9_7.1.i686.rpm
opencryptoki-libs-3.25.0-4.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
opencryptoki-swtok-3.25.0-4.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
opencryptoki-3.25.0-4.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
opencryptoki-devel-3.25.0-4.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
opencryptoki-icsftok-3.25.0-4.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
opencryptoki-libs-3.25.0-4.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
opencryptoki-swtok-3.25.0-4.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/opencryptoki-3.25.0-4.el9_7.1.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[3.25.0-4.1]
- Fix unwrapping of attribute bound EC keys
- Fix private secure key blob import
  Resolves: RHEL-131644
